subparts.text: Why drain current is zero in absence of gate voltage even if drain voltage is applied in NMOS enhancement transistor.
Differentiate between constant field scaling and constant voltage scaling.
What is the “active area” in fabrication process.
Why CMOS logic is ratioless logic.
What are advantages and drawbacks of BiCMOS circuits.
What is LOCOS in CMOS fabrication.
What is difference between transmission gate and pass transistor.

questions.question_text: Explain operation regions of MOS transistor using Energy band diagram.
Draw and explain various capacitance in MOS model. CO Mapping
Implement the function 𝑍= ̅̅̅̅̅̅̅̅̅̅̅̅̅̅̅̅̅̅̅̅̅̅̅̅̅̅ using CMOS logic and NMOS logic. How many transistors are required for each type of implementation.
Give implementation of edge triggered D flip flop and explain its working. CO Mapping
Explain the working principle of dynamic CMOS logic.
Draw and explain NORA CMOS logic. CO Mapping
How programmable logic devices are useful in chip design. Explain with examples.
Draw and compare the basic BiCMOS inverter and the conventional CMOS inverter. Specifically, address voltage swing and propagation delay.
